rules.title: OpenClaw remote channel policy detected
rules.why_it_matters: Remote channels can trigger agent sessions. Channel policies and allowlists determine who can reach the agent.
recommended_actions: Rotate bot tokens if they were exposed in local files.
recommended_alternatives: Use local-only mode for sensitive workspaces.
rules.migration_instruction: Set explicit allowFrom values and disable group triggers unless they are required.

rules.title: OpenClaw scheduled or background execution detected
rules.why_it_matters: Scheduled agent tasks can start later, when the user is not actively reviewing each action.
recommended_actions: Review scheduled task prompts and allowed tools.
recommended_alternatives: Use manual run mode for sensitive workflows.
rules.migration_instruction: Disable scheduled execution for this agent until the task prompt and tool permissions are reviewed.
